titleStmt.title: SII 28.272: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 272. (A.R. No. 426 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, central shrine, on the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front.

Records a royal grant of 3000 kuḻi of first grade wet-land, the kīḻpaṟṟu under (irrigated by) the lake Kulaśēkharaṉ-peri-ēri along with the cesses (leviable in respect of that land) as capital for the daily routine of worship, the foodofferings and decorations (chāttu-paḍi) for the God Kulaśēkhara-āvuḍaiyār, consecrated in the name of aṇṇāḻvi (elder brother of the king ?) by Kaṇḍiyadēvar in the temple of Tirukkāmīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār, the God of Āṟagaḷūr in Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam in Milāḍu alias Jaṉanātha-vaḷanāḍu. The order was addressed to the tāṉattār of the temple. The copy was attested by the Uḍaiyāṉ of Uraikuḍiin Pāṇḍi-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ḥ svasti ḥ śrī . śrītirumukappaṭi koccaṭapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīsundarapāṇṭiyadevaṟkku
yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu Etirāmāṇṭu Āṭimātam milāṭākiya jaṉaṉāta vaḷanāṭṭu Āṟṟūṟ
kūṟṟattu Āṟakaḷūruṭaiyār tirukkā�written below the line.miśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārkku Iṉṉār ko
yil Aṇṇāḻvi tirunāmattāl kaṇṭiyatevar Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Āvuṭaiyār kulacekara Āvuṭaiyaārkku
Amutupaṭi cāttupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa nitta niyamattukku Uṭalāka Ivvūrk kulacekaraṉ peri Eriyil kiḻpaṟṟu naṉ
cey mutaṟ tarattile Aṉaittāyam Uṭpaṭa muvāyiram kuḻi kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku I Olai piṭipāṭāka koṇ
ṭu Iṉṉilam kallilum cempilum veṭṭi nāṉkellaiyum tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇṇi cantirātittavarai
yum Aṉupavittup potuvatu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāṇṭi maṇṭalattu Uraiykuṭi Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu §
Ivai tiruveḻuttu tulliyam §
Digital edition of SII 28.272 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
